title: Paraphrased air-gapped sandbox
stakeholder_intent: The container must be air-gapped from any external service and must not communicate with anything outside its own isolated execution cell.
formalized_policy: Localhost connections are allowed. External internet access is denied.
implementation_claim: The sandbox blocks external network access but permits loopback communication.
expected_issue: Rule-based extraction may miss the 'air-gapped' phrasing and yield zero constraints for the stakeholder intent. Fuzzy/LLM extraction should map it to no_network (or equivalent). Once the intent is recognized as no_network, the policy's localhost allowance is a concrete implication failure in the abstract sandbox model.
